channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Any active duty US military members or veterans on /biz/? — 59 replies — 195.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Any active duty US military members or veterans on /biz/?

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-07-07 13:07 UTC

OP

Any active duty US military members or veterans on /biz/?

I joined the military and I wanna know how to get a million dollars. I put 10% of my income into my retirement account and the rest of my free cash into index funds.

Early replies (first 3)

62447635
>>62447595
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sZZaOR4UCnE

62447641
>>62447595
The only smart play is to aim for a 100% disability rating which you can get in ~1 to 4 years (1 enlistment).
I know several guys getting $4000+ a month for life.
I am a vet and I get nothing.

62447664
>>62447595
If you're not high rank or close to information in some other way then it's just another job. Not gonna change much in terms of how getting a million would look like, you'll have to gamble like the rest of us.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62448554
>>62448525
Mental illness

62448558
>>62448554
Lol disabled keyboard warrior downy

62448572
>>62447635
>>62447740

If any of you actually served you would know how anti-Israel the military is.

62448579
>>62448572
Which military, the iranian military

As for the US just keep sucking those circumcised peckers, they own you, bitch all you want about it

62448581
>>62447641
> I know several guys getting $4000+ a month for life
What a waste of $4000 going to the lower classes.

62448588
>>62448251
Just reply to them once. No need to point out why they glow. Dumb ass.

62448608
>>62447962
>>62448482
>>62448503
>>62448554
OCPD-poster detected. Go praise the jews elsewhere.

62448679
Last drone video about why doing war in the drone age is utter shit. https://i.4cdn.org/k/1783172321354125.webm

62448903
>>62448588
I just want it to stop. None of them care that this shit is extra inauthentic and borderline schizoid.

62448986
>>62448469
>>62448452
And this shit too
Some 29yo bitch talking about how young men should be sent to a meat grinder while her husband is 65.

Literally boomers trying to kill zoomers so they can fuck their daughters.

62449000
>>62447724
>promote it
You're the one promoting the idea of invading iran for real, genius, I'm telling you if you think it's "a better idea' then you can go hang out with the glowcrew.

62449029
>>62448022
Navy is a good way to save but realistically Coast Guard is probably nicer. Have a plan on saving $50k in 3yrs without deployment then put it in a fund and watch it grow

>>62448254
If they're going to be gay retards sure, but something harder to prove like mental health is easier.
VAC gets denied because you need consistent med appts when you're in otherwise you get nothing

62449133
>>62448581
The military is a welfare system for the power classes.

62449315
>>62447961
This is so true it's not even funny. I also can't emphasize enough how many retards BURN MONEY on new cars while laughing at me for driving an 07 shitbox.
I have never seen so many $50-80k cars in my life, trucks, SUVs and even a brand new Tesla. After a bit of time in you'll n/o/tice

62449322
>>62447595
the only way for the military members to make money is to go rob other country and sell drugs nigger
thats what the ships are for nigger

62449330
>>62447595
Unironically document your injuries, apply for appropriate disability before getting out

then start applying for fed jobs immediately. Use your college money. Hire on with the government. In time you might try government contracting, it pays a lot more than waging. But even fed wagies are often millionaires. Buy a house, that helps. If you work for the government they'll help you buy a house and then sell it if you move.

62449744
>Let the goyim deal in the real world

62450947
>>62448572
>reddit spacing
>post written by a zogbot with an israeli flag within 100ft at all times
>erm actually the heckin military hates its sole mission of fighting wars for israel

62451074
>>62447697
Israel/US jews did 9/11.
>t. two deployment Army veteran

62451135
>>62448022
They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once. Which is virtually everyone. The only way to get what is owed now is to apply for disability. When everyone who got out in the last 20 years is telling you to do it, you do that. Do not trust anyone in active service about this!

I wish I saved the shifty eyed army recruiter Wojack.

62451175
>>62451074
>two deployment Army Veteran
at least you admit you're a retard

62451198
>>62451135
Seriously do not trust them. Soldiers have a difficult adjustment to civilian life because they have to switch to from blind order following to street smarts where even their friends can back stab them. Soldiers who never adopt the either get killed with their deaths covered up. Sometimes soldiers just get killed for no reason.

62451215
>>62448579
>>62450947
youre so mindbroken lmao

62451282
>>62451215
You will never be a patriot

62451292
>>62447641
This. From everything I've heard and seen, aiming for disability is the way to go.

You will probably lose your dignity in the pursuit of this though, but the long-term benefits are probably worth it. They might be clamping down on this under Hegseth I imagine, but maybe it depends on your branch.

62451309
>>62447797
Its a good idea because you actually GET something not just numbers on a screen.
He might have $1 Million to pay down later but he has atleast 4 properties providing him passive income.
Not just income to pay down the mortgages, but actually passive income on top of that.
Landlording is extremely profitable and if you don't understand it you shouldn't get into it.
But you are fucking way the fuck up by not using the VA loan ever. It's an instant ticket to real estate. Buy with the intention to landlord and you will go far.
>>62451135
>>62451198
>They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once
You don't live in reality.
There are millions of vets recieving disability. The point of disability is so the government doesnt get sued. It's workman's comp.
If what you said was true then no one would recieve it.
You probably dont even know the types of discharges that qualify you for VA disability or P&T vs TDIU. You don't know none of the details of course.
You don't care because you just want to schizopost.

This is why you dont trust stupid old people on this site. They just think they know it all and get more stubborn and post borderline schizo shit.

62451317
>>62451292
VA is for every branch.
No one is taking away VA benefits the government would be sued.
Hegseth doesnt matter.
VA benefits = Workers comp
That is the entire point of it existing.

62451419
>>62451135
>They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once.
KEK. I just realized you know even less than I thought initially.
You do know the VA doesnt give disability until after you are out of the service, right?
How can they take away your bennies when you have an honorable discharge?
You probably don't even know what types of discharges there are yet you're saying this shit.
>>62451198
Is this what happened to your dad?
Failed to switch between blindly following orders and street smarts? And died?
>>62447896
>My family quit being a military family
>because of negations of benefits
>They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once
What the fuck does this mean? Your dad was dishonorably discharged for disobeying orders? Just say that.
See this is why OP called you a schizophrenic incel.
I know Im replying way too much to these posts but this is not how reality works at all. Your view is not reality.

62454571
>>62447595
Vet here. AMA

62454901
>>62454571
Did you make a million dollars over the course of your service?

item.title: House buying — 80 replies — 181.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
House buying

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:59 UTC

OP

I have $180k sitting in an S&P500 index fund and every normie I meet says I'm making a mistake by not getting a mortgage ASAP because housing will only get more expensive.

What is the /biz/ philosophy on this advice? I'm a rentoid and currently pay only around $1000 a month.

Early replies (first 3)

62447251
>>62447246
>every normie I meet says
You could buy and then the market severely crashes.
Housing shouldn't be a financial asset but that's corporatism for you.

62447257
>>62447251
Yea i guess but the stock market "could" also crash and i lose everything. That's not really insightful advice.

62447265
Lmao you are a rentoid

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62448426
For $180k you could buy 5 acres of rural land and build at least the envelope of a house and not owe anyone anything.

62448439
>>62447246
do nigresses really goon to this kind of slop? Do they even read?

62448441
>>62448426
$180k would barely get you a livable house in Eastern Europe today.

62448442
>>62447246
>bwwm

>italians
>white

62448454
>>62447823
>fast forward 20 years
wont even take a third of that timeline, 38% of the boomer generation already croaked, look it up if you don't believe me.
We haven't seen much of an impact on the prices yet (well, depends where you live becuz here it already tanked a good 25% from 2022 highs) because it's younger boomies inheriting all the houses from older boomers. And since they are boomers, they know what they got and have enough cash reserves to sit on empty houses for years, waiting for a bounce back who will never come. I know becuz my parents inherited 3 houses the past 5 years and sold only one lol.

62448456
>>62448442
the dude literally is darker than the semi-bleached muttess lol. What is going on in BW heads?

62448596
>>62447246
>because housing will only get more expensive.
Maybe, likely so for big cities that get more job offerings and infinite jeets/immigrants. Rural areas? I am not sure, those might start to drop once boomers die off and zoomers/alphas are too poor and low in numbers and not interested in rural houses.

62448620
>>62448596
Incel rentoids now experts on the housing market, is there anything they dont know?

62448624
>>62448620
I am a proud owner of a commieblock apartment and some fields and forestland that I got from my parents/grandparents.

62448648
>>62448441
Build from scratch be your own contractor

62448659
>>62448624
Thats nice maybe keep out of discussions on America if from commieblock land

62448682
>>62448659
>implying you're in the US
idiot. If we kick the foreigners out you'll be gone first.

62448689
Normies are not getting mortgages because rates are like 6.5% when they would not normally be 3%>.

62448696
>>62448689
Boomers paid 20%

62448701
>>62447286
>2nd house for 425k around 31.
>2nd house is worth 900k now
What happened is their dollars lost half the purchasing power.
BTW they didn't but the house for $425k. They bought it for that plus whatever they pay in interest over time. Which is very likely to be closer to the amount they sold it for later.
It's nice to build equity, but don't be a fool.

62449002
>>62447246
>I have $180k sitting in an S&P500 index fund and every normie I meet says I'm making a mistake by not getting a mortgage ASAP because housing will only get more expensive.
>What is the /biz/ philosophy on this advice? I'm a rentoid and currently pay only around $1000 a month.
I'm in a similar position to you and unless you have a lifestyle reason to need a house it doesn't make financial sense right now IMO. Look at it financially, houses cost probably on the ballpark of 300-350k, let's just assume 325k median in a low to medium cost area, that's a 145k loan, at 6.25% interest rate the annual loss of interest only of 9k on year 1 and 8.9k on year 2 contrasted with an annual net loss currently of 12k a year renting but you also dont have other costs like property taxes, insurance, and maintenance costs that should be baked into rent but are not going to baked into that interest loss of yhe house so add those in too, where i live I'd pay 6k prop tax, 1k insurance, and rule of thumb is to budget 1-3% of home value so 3.25k-9.8k. To build on the case if you have money in the SP500 it has returned 10.5% annually (18.9k) or if you want to play it safe 4.5% in CDs (8.1k). That said, it depends on how long you are looking to buy a house, how risk tolerant you are, and if your landlord wants to increase rents. Run those numbers down a spreadsheet and see what makes sense for you in your area but i have come to the conclusion of letting my money ride in the market for the time being knowing the risk that I could get burned.

62450291
>>62447246
my advice is quit snooping around your mom's secret book collection

62450516
average home price prior to covid was 4.5 years of salary; now its closer to 6.8 years of salary. prices are too high and is way cheaper to rent for now. i save while renting to buy outright, fuck a mortgage.

62450518
>>62448701
>nice to build equity
>depreciating asset requires upkeep
>no where to go but up

ive seen this movie before, sometime around 2008 i think

62450563
>>62450516
Thats a you problem if you cant double your wage post covid

62450591
I know this is biz but everyone here is talking about buying a house as though you have to make money off the decision, I could care less about making money off my house, I bought it because it was a huge lifestyle upgrade and now I live 100x better than when I was renting an apartment, it feels like I finally started my real life.

62450594
>>62447246
Let the boomers deal in the real world. Housing is a terrible investment if there is any risk to your income over the term of the loan. My cousin sold TSLA to put a down-payment on a home $120k. The most money he ever had. Home price was $230k. Turned out the home was a lemon and he had dumped another $80k into repairs. Guess what? He lost the house when he and his wife's winery side hustle failed. $200k given to bank for a couple years being a homeowner. Had he put the money into an index fund he'd be worth half a million by now.

62450595
houses are for living in, not speculation

62450600
>>62450594
the math on this story isn't adding up, bro had a $110K loan after that down payment which is only like $500 a month, sounds like he was just bad at finance if he lost it with that payment

62450606
>>62448058
Jealous blk boi

62450608
>>62450600
Rentoids all suck at math their anecdotes are fake as fuck but real in their bitter minds

62450897
My house is paid off. Feels great man. 6 bedrooms 3.5 baths on half an acre. Great home for my family of 6.

62451180
>>62450600
You can't even follow basic math. He had a $190k loan at around 6%. Hardly $500 a month with insurance, taxes, mortgage insurance, etc.

>>62450608
My cost to rent is 11% of my take home pay. You are spending more on a mortgage with no guarantee of keeping your home.

Biz really has the dumbest anons.

62454567
>>62447246
I unironically read this book

62454883
>>62450897
Sounds shitty man, i can just save and invest without being bled dry by a bunch of kids who are gonna grow up trans

item.title: When the FUCK is this AI shit going to crash? — 26 replies — 104.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
When the FUCK is this AI shit going to crash?

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-07-07 13:15 UTC

OP

When the FUCK is this AI shit going to crash?

Early replies (first 3)

62444975
Don’t cry Bobina

62445016
>>62444969
Oooooooooo BOOOOOOOBIIIINNNNAAAAAAAA OOOOOOOOOOOOHHHHHHHHUUUUUUUHHHHHH!!!!!!!!!!!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62445048
>>62444969
55k next weeek!

62445049
bobina is thick asf

62448136
Comforting sex with Bobina

62448224
>>62444969
i unironically think it is too big to fail
>if it crashes the US economy is fucked
>elites are depending on it for their mass datacenter surveillance state
>if US companies fail then chyna wins
US government will prop it up at all costs
prove me wrong

62448245
>>62444969
Unironically soon.

62448465
>>62444969
when you FOMO in

62448519
bobina dev is a deranged individual, stay away at all costs

62449610
>>62444969
IDK enough about the finances of the companies to say, but the demand for the hardware isn't going away any time soon. If you need hardware, buy now. When M5 studio drops, it's probably going to be up to 128gb of ram, and those will sell out in a heartbeat, further driving up prices on RTX 6000's and DGX sparks when people panic-buy whatever significant compute they can.

62449618
>>62444969
that's hard to predict. in the end, Ed Zitron will be proven right.

62449622
>>62444969
Bobina best grill

62449659
>>62448519
hello chudcel

62449668
Bobos in shambles

62449893
>>62444969
H-h-help me leave my short cleanly!!

62450137
>When the FUCK is this horseless carriage shit going to crash?

This is how retarded you sound OP

62450141
>>62450137
>car: obviously useful for transportation
>llm: generates naked cartoon bears

62450151
I honestly think that the crash won’t really change shit until 5+ years after. The stock for future batches of ram and ssd are already bought up until 2029 (and will probably be gone for more batches in the future). And while slop will definitely be reduced, it will still be slop and companies will realize that ai shit isn’t good, and the job market will still be like shit (tho it won’t get much worse)

62450641
>>62444969
>spaceX going public to save X AI
>anthropic going public soon
>openai thinking about going public
>all of them spending out the ass on capex
>increasing reports from other companies that AI hasn’t been all it was cracked up to be

They’re literally going public to use us for exit liquidity. The valuations are such that the large-cap index funds will have to buy substantial stakes upon listing, and of course retail investoors will gobble it up trying to make a quick profit or thinking they’re “early.” I give it a year or so but it’s going to pop

62451288
yann wants to crash the market

62453117
>>62450141
The rule 34 bobinas that have been posted are goonworthy, but not trillion dollar market cap worthy

62453139
>>62451288
it's almost like we should have been hiring white men with degrees and shit to guide the AI or whatever, possibly even pay them middle class salaries to do so.

Oh well.

62453143
>>62450151
>until 2029!
Ram and ssd companies like Micron are already crashing.

62454757
>>62444969
2 more weeks!

62454929
>>62444969
It already is

item.title: IT'S OFFICIAL!!!!! Ripple has received its EU CASP license. We are now fully MiCA-compliant and ready to meet growing Eu… — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
IT'S OFFICIAL!!!!! Ripple has received its EU CASP license. We are now fully MiCA-compliant and ready to meet growing Eu…

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-07-07 13:16 UTC

OP

IT'S OFFICIAL!!!!!

Ripple has received its EU CASP license. We are now fully MiCA-compliant and ready to meet growing European crypto demand!

>https://x.com/Ripple/status/2074048653019279478

Early replies (first 3)

62452299
>$1.15
So fucking bullish

62452323
>>62452224
BEEEEEEEEEUUUUUUUUUMMM

62452333
>>62452224
>xrp
>demand
lmao
also price, chart

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62452437
>>62452224
So, two more weeks?

62452438
>>62452224
BOOM status?

62452444
>>62452224
As a European, I assure you that nobody here cares—to an extent you can't even imagine.

62452457
>>62452444
It’s not for you dumbass. Institutions want regulation and you’ll get it through your new EUDI digital wallet because of them

62452467
>>62452438
Ka

62452469
Crypto is so fucking dead

62453940
>>62452224
Based as fuck! Ripple are the (non-evil) Microsoft of web3.

62453943
>>62452333
The chart (link is the one beneath Terra Luna's death spiraled LUNC lol).

62454855
>>62452224
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62454886
>>62452224
>2018
>BANKS WILL FLOCK TO US, AND WE'RE TAKING OVER SWIFT

>2026
>becomes a tiny little bank that uses Swift along with all other banks

Ripple is a joke

62454927
>>62452224
Everest got a MICA license first and it’s at 1 million marketcap

62454932
>>62454927
https://everestdotorg.medium.com/everest-granted-mica-licence-9f5672301060

item.title: Today is freedom day in burgerland, this means the CLARITY ACT has officially passed. — 29 replies — 54.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today is freedom day in burgerland, this means the CLARITY ACT has officially passed.

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:54 UTC

OP

Today is freedom day in burgerland, this means the CLARITY ACT has officially passed.

Now many crypto's like XRP and Chainlink are no longer illegal and the banks can start buying it.

Are you ready for the pump of a lifetime in the coming weeks?

Early replies (first 3)

62444894
I just took 70mg of illicit amphetamine sulfate

62444895
>>62444894
That's very nice to hear, I hope you are enjoying yourself.

62444904
>>62444895
it's nothing like meth (oral ROA meth had no euphoria either), minimal vasoconstriction; none really. not euphoric like adderall either, it feels like super non-diuretic caffeine. this has a 1:1 dextro:racemic ratio; so the pharma equivalent is evekeo.

I thought it was bunk but my heart rate is elevated but no arrhythmia like meth (that shit is poison, it'll keep you up for 3-5 days with no perceptual fatigue at significant cost)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62444906
>>62444895
I'm just irritated unless im working or reading something. which is the intended effect, it's just super mechanical caffeine idk how to describe it. it's impossible to "idle" on this shit, I have to be doing something.

62444911
>>62444904
>>62444906
okay well thats nice and all but not really what my thread was about

62444922
>>62444911
hm, do you know how it impacts privacy coins like XMR or even zioncash (ZEC)?

62444929
>>62444922
i do not

62444934
>>62444929
alright, I appreciate it regardless. thoughts on CBDCs?

62444939
>>62444934

I actually dont know much about that also

62444940
>>62444939
you sound like a nice guy no homo

62444948
these 2 got married y'know

62444959
>>62444940
Haha thanks man you too

>>62444948
Nooo we are just friends haha

62444978
>>62444892
> CLARITY ACT
wasn't there some announcement announced for yesterday?

62444991
op they haven't voted on it and aren't close to voting on it. they're hoping to get it done before august 10

62444995
>>62444991
Somone told me clarity act was 4th of july a few weeks ago

62445015
>>62444948
naw, the no homo made marriage impossible
>>62444959
>we are just friends
this

62445147
>>62444978
No, Trump did an interview restating that the US will be the crypto capital of the world.
>>62444892
CLARITY will pass, but there is a lot going behind the scenes that's causing it to stall. Did you know that CLARITY allows banks to buy and sell crypto? The last time US banks traded stocks was before the great depression.

62445160
>>62445147
Oh that's very interesting, thanks for sharing my friend

62445194
So, two more weeks?

62445212
>>62444948
you're responding to a samefag trying to keep his thread at the top because no one cares.

>>62444892
no one cares

62445217
>>62445212
that's not me

62445568
Why isnt crypto pumping harder?

62448360
>>62444892
The banks can already buy both. ETF inflows broke records despite being from small issuers on XRP, highest of any asset on the year, while inflows are borderline non-existent for link.

62448734
Everyone itt thread is a retarded bot.
Fake thread.

62450765
>>62444892
BOOOOOOOOOM

62450968
I hate niggers

62451473
>>62450968
Kaboom

62454381
>>62444892
>banks start buying it
okay jeet

62454867
>XRP

So. Fucking. Bullish.

item.title: Scammers are slowly coming back — 20 replies — 38.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Scammers are slowly coming back

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:54 UTC

OP

I recently noticed some shill threads starting to pop up for old shitcoins and they're all filled with the OP samefagging his way to the top of the catalog. There's no fucking way that the few retards left who still browse this board are still falling for this old and tired scheme, right?

Early replies (first 3)

62453081
Falling for schemes is an old tradition

62453085
>>62453079
no saaar me only buy VOO and wait 40 years

62453197
>>62453085
Boomers are unironically theo nes posting that, I saw a threat about investments on /pol/ and it was dudes saying "my son is in college and I invest in VOOOOOOO for him".

If this website didn't get ruined by boomers and jeets I wouldn't even be talking about jobs and business I'd just be retired. Kill boomers.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62453208
>>62453197
OH GOD IM GONNA-

IM GONNA VOO

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAARGH, OH GOD IM VOOOING AAAAAAAAAAAAAA

62453220
>>62453208
One of them unironically gave the advice to "get a degree and climb the corporate ladder" like it's 1986.

62453246
>>62453079
>wagmi

62453254
>>62453220
>get a degree and climb the corporate ladder
still works if you got into an ivy league, they're all 100% employed. they won the game.

62453264
>>62453197
Ive noticed the incels who cry nonstop about boomers are all broke losers

62453265
FXAIX and SPMD for me

62453284
>>62453254
You forgot be jewish or married to a jew, that's an important part of the equation.

>>62453264
Lol you're that one neet who shits up ever thread, shut the fuck up when your betters are talking you pathetic incel.

62453325
>>62453284
VOO posters have, at minimum, 100x your net worth

62453350
>>62453284
So when you aren't blaming the boomers for your shit life you blame the jews? Take responsibility for your life and things will get better

62453504
>>62453350
Of course others are responsible that people do worse and worse. That's a product of their surroundings. The retarded psyop of "blame yourself" for terrible circumstances is so retarded, only amerimutts fall for it.

62453536
>>62453504
Thats why you are poor incel instead of fixing your mistakes you just blame someone else

62453705
>>62453325
>can't even spell 'scam'
>thinks he can fool people into thinking he has more than two quarters to rub together
THe only portfolio posters on this board are the people who invested into thinks like bitcoin, nvidia or micron.

There is no "look at my voo folio" that has more than 100k max, you broke fag.

62453944
>>62453079
Idk, i just kbow the bottom is 55k and a LOOOONG crab.

62453952
please bring back memecoins
im so fucking bored

62454256
>>62453952
What are you talking about? Memecoins are not dead.

62454856
>>62453952
>Bring back memecoins
The entire SOL chain would have to get nuked for that to even be considered a possibility.

>>62454256

62454869
>>62454856

item.title: The only CASP (MICA) licensed firm with a token attached — 50 replies — 35.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
The only CASP (MICA) licensed firm with a token attached

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:01 UTC

OP

Hey everyone I know it’s been a while since alpha been dropped on biz but here’s some that will change your life by years end. There is only one current MICA license holder with a token and it’s Everest ID. They just got it granted today and it’s still in discovery. This will be the next runner for the RWA/Stablecoin narrative that’s coming once the USA clarity bill is approved. Still a microcap that’s ready to go. If you’re reading this, you’re welcome. The founder is deeply involved with tokeny/apex spearheading the ERC-3643 rwa tokenization standard

https://everestdotorg.medium.com/everest-granted-mica-licence-9f5672301060

Early replies (first 3)

62437251
>>62437175
>MICA license holder with a token
owow it's fucking nothing

62437273
>>62437251
Can’t see the Forest. How sad

62437736
>>62437175
intradasting

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62445336
>>62437906
Greetings, Ivan

62445632
Chainlink tonight killed himself because of this token.

62445663
>>62445632
The long bear for this token was part of the ritual. He should have held and waited

62446003
>>62437175
Direct banking rails coming online. Tick tock anons the price will not stop rising with the news that will be coming all through 2026

62447324
>>62437175
again this scam, DO NOT BUY THE WILL DUMP SOON, it happens everytime they make a thread about it here

62447343
>>62437175
Ok dude so I looked a bit at this shit dead token and to my surprise this is only traded on Uniswap according to CMC so my conclusion is to never touch this shit ever and keep going DCA on HYPE

Hyperliquid

62447383
>>62441690
never happening :DDDDDDDDDD

62447523
>>62447383
No longer a scam. As confirmed by European regulators. Scams don’t get that license. They have spent 200k to get that license over two year and need to have to maintain 150k in capital permanently. Regulators would not give them the license without future proof of revenue and profitability too

62447539
>>62447523
corruption

62447578
>>62447539
Binance tried to get a license from one of the most corrupt of countries in the eu (Greece) handing out licenses and they couldn’t make the cut. If they couldn’t pay their way nobody can

62447586

62447598
>>62447586
The EU is actively ethnociding the native population of europe things only went down hill since the inception of the EU and euro they need to go

62447603
go to more shark tanks begging for 100K grants Bob

hilarious how these threads pop up only after any sort of limp pump happens every 6 months or so before inevitably going to a new all time low, friendly reminder that the 24h volume of this deadcoin was basically ZERO last month

62447605

everytime

62447610
>>62447603

item.title: Would you eat a baby for 30000 LINK? — 16 replies — 23.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Would you eat a baby for 30000 LINK?

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:44 UTC

OP

Would you eat a baby for 30000 LINK?

Early replies (first 3)

62452053
>>62452048
Most Linkies would unironically do that because they're deranged cuckolds who worship a Saturnian/Jewish token (even if they never got rich off it)

I wouldn't though because my sould is worth much more than some premined shitcoin

62452190
>>62452048
What color is the baby?

62452215
>>62452048
I dont want AIDS

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62452247
>>62452048
I would do it for free.

62452338
30000 link is gonna be like four cents soon so no

62452476
>>62452053
Or is it because it would make your IBS flare up? LMAO

62452505
>>62452476
Kek

62452606
>>62452053
I use literally to harden and anchor the actual objectivity of what I write to punctuate each poinit to remind faggots like you not everyone is just gushing team sports slop and there is an actual reality despite your persistent, deep attempt to repress it in yourself and repress its expression to others. This entire schtick is so fucking stupid and low effort/IQ. "Oooooh I don't like that you proved me wrong so you're a russian bot oh and did you know Trump said they were very fine people!!!!!" It is literally indistinguishable from this level of rhetoric. Why would I rewrite the same information multiple times which you are unable to engage with and spend valuable time of my life redundantly generating the same framed concept when I can just reshare it? Lol You spend hours sperging and never comment on ANYTHING substantial claimed and call me effeminate but literally just do lefty hivemind power messaging tactics to try to save face in arguments you admit to yourself and everyone you can't win. The irony is in all of your accusation you are literally an NPC in human bot form, and despite this all, the same way you tacitly admit that you know your position is indefensible by being this way, you also admit you recognize our argumentative supremacy over you by (probably totally unknown to you) absorbing specific terminology used to try to superficially emulate us through osmosis thinking using these words will transfer the value of what we say when the whole point is that we are right on substance and you have nothing to say and don't care what's true and it doesn't matter which words you use to express this. REALLY fucking gay way to live and be and if you are a paid poster, which is very possible, you are a spineless plague rat of jews with negative value add into the world and a shame to your ancestors

62453083
>>62452048
No.

62453931
>>62452048
Am I allowed to sell the link instantly upon receiving it (I still wouldn't do it, but this is the worst possible incentive to, though I imagine most linkie cultists would).

62453933
>>62452606
t. seething linkie copypaste [can't] copefag

62453988
fuck stinks
hate em all
think they suck

62454033
>>62453933
I'm not a copy paster, you retarded fucking nigger. I repost the same post I originally wrote because you repressed niggers have NO response for it and because you literally don't care what's real ALWAYS cope by playing gay literal 2016 leftist tier rhetoric games to try to have me reputationally or socially dismissed because you can't reply to the argument and you know your investment is indefensibly incoherent and literally fucking retarded.

You disingenuous, sniveling fucking kike, I did not post the same thing in the same thread. (You) copypasted my post because you are a fucking kike wanting to continue to shill your shitty no utility project and by arguing this way tacitly and nakedly admit that you have ZERO argument, don't understand your own tech, and most importantly know this and that your investment thesis is a retarded, demoralized corporate findom arrangement literally no exaggeration and you know you have no ability to even begin to argue after trying and getting REKT across 200 threads straight, so you do gay underhanded jew/leftist muh russian bots style messaging strategies to try to sophistically color around the shape and hope that everyone accepts your social proof window dressing/papering over, with your literal goal being that they don't consider the actual facts of the matter as they relate to xrp and how retarded and literally incoherent the bull thesis is for it. With the cross-asset crash you are getting another chance to pick better after the long slog of failure you have crystalized and instad of choosing it you are choosing to double down and signal consensus/compliance with the gayest subculture to ever exist. You would LITERALLY rather not make it, than just admit you were wrong about the thing that has financially devastated your savings more than anything ever has. I literally cannot imagine the lived nigger Hell of being you and how repressed and defense mechanism hard

62454179
>>62454033
Gay/low IQ, bottom of barrel cope. See:
>>62453933

62454241
>>62452048
No, but i would sell a baby for 30000 LINK

62454847
Just so you know >>62454179 is a faggot who is literally incapable of any pushback whatsoever and somehow thinks copypastaing past posts of mine is an own or something. Lol I honestly have no idea what they think it achieves but probably it is just telling themselves they did something therefore it is sufficient which is just the basis they need to will cognitive dissonance from conscious awareness.

It means that since the last time the entire market meaningfully shifted across all tokens, restructuring into a completely new paradigm vis-a-vis institutional/government level legitimacy, after similarly moving in lockstep in a less performative way, XRP is the only to meaningfully keep its gains at that exact point. Random moving averages or x to date pictures mean nothing vs. cycle to date or pivotal market moments to date. I am not cherrypicking, I am literally choosing the moment everything changed and Chokepoint 2.0/Gensler was priced in as dead and how assets have behaved since then. It isn't arbitrary, you just don 't like that it is true. You should check out Hedgeye's commentary on YTD vs. cycle to date to become a non-macro casual and slightly less economically retarded. Again, I LITERALLY granularly argued the tech itself for dozens of threads across months and you niggers eventually just pivoted to argument avoidance which is how we are where we are now, which is usually just me granularly describing why we are here and what you are doing and why. It is funny you critique my diction and writing but yourself write in a very stilted way that is clearly aiming to be superficially on some sort of level you think an imagined brilliance will shine through (as opposed to and in contrast to me!) but you really don't say anything yourself and take 2 paragraphs to do so. Also ironic you criticize me for using "buzzwords and misunderstood concepts and bitterness and insecurity" but this is literally your motivating force

item.title: my brother-in-law is a literal genius, like 150+ IQ, and worked his ass off over the last 15 years or so to become a suc… — 40 replies — 23.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
my brother-in-law is a literal genius, like 150+ IQ, and worked his ass off over the last 15 years or so to become a suc…

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-07-07 11:41 UTC

OP

my brother-in-law is a literal genius, like 150+ IQ, and worked his ass off over the last 15 years or so to become a successful entrepreneur and just completely failed. he's flat broke now. it's crazy to me how hard it is to make good money even if you're smart and hardworking. the world is fucking brutal.

Early replies (first 3)

62449875
>>62449873
“Smart” and didn’t go all in crypto. I shiggy diggy

62449876
Almost like being a business owner is just being a wagie with more work and all of your capital at risk.

62449881
>>62449876
Nah that's being self employed, an entrepreneur convertes other peoples time and labour into money

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449948
>>62449942
This is more white incel loser cope

>waaaah anyone who calls out my crybaby behavior is an Indian, a foid or a joo

Grow up

62449954
>>62449873
If he gives up after one failure he's not going to make it through the next 5 failures that will eventually teach him how to succeed

also geniuses don't usually do great at business. The sweet spot for starting a business is in the 100-120 range. Smart enough to make good decisions but dumb enough not to give up when things go wrong anyways.

62449984
>>62449948
Lol poojeet fails to name a brand and seethes

62449992
>>62449984
Not him but that one pajeet was smart with providing Indians with free internet which then destroyed the internet for the rest of the world.

62449994
>>62449992
Steve poojobs? He did look a little bit indian at the end

62450060
>>62449873
He's probably too smart. He want to create great things that revolutionize peoples lives, but the easiest way to make it is to scam stupid people.

62450077
>>62449984
Why would a poojeet take orders from a white incel loser? Y'all lower caste than dalits. Know your place and lower your tone

62450101
>>62449873
I got paid a full day at my job on Thursday for LITERALLY doing nothing but writing my magnum opus novel, watching my niece and playing pokemon showdown.


It's a skill issue. Not an IQ one.

62450119
>>62449876

If you work “in” the business it’s just like owning your job.

62450121
>>62449942

Tata motors which owns Jaguar and Land Rover.

62450123
>>62450101

You have a job tho, it’s different than trying to start a business

62450129
>>62449887
top silicon valley ceos are all high iq, top wallstreet executives too, there's just no way you can survive that kind of environment without constantly observing obscure patterns, so your shallow analysis doesn't track
>>62449873
your brother in law probably failed because he wasn't part of the group, he probably tried to muscle into someone else's turf, what business was he into?

62450177
>>62450121
I know of someone who own a land rover, a newer model. He went for a drive in sand with it and the engine burned out, he got it replaced and went down to the beach to drive over sand dunes. Engine burned out again

Lmao aryan quality, I didn't know tata acquired land rover in 2008 but it makes sense now

62450181
>>62450077
You took your vaccines like a good cattle everyone knows you poojoos are the most subservient minions

62450429
>>62450077
Castes aren't a real thing it's some turdjeet larp among themselves.
In reality there's only turdjeets and actual human (white) people.

62450441
>>62450429
Face it you white incel losers are the lowest caste people in the world. Unlike Indians NO ONE likes you or wants you around AND you are BROKE

62450451
>>62450441
Get off that white dick poopoid

62450460
>>62450451
Post some more about how you are broke and depressed but deserve an easy life because you are white

62450481
>>62450460
I deserve an easy life and I have an easy life while you're broke and depressed and looking for some dick

62450485
>>62449873
I'm retarded and have made millions.
Just the way it goes sometimes OP.
Being smart isn't a ticket to success crazy enough.

62450500
>>62449873
BTDT. I was lucky that Bitcoin came along when it did or I'd be living in a cardboard box sucking off meth addicts.

62450584
>>62449873
>150+ IQ
>worked his ass off over the last 15 years
158 IQ here. Only one of those statements can be true (probably the 2nd). If he were actually that smart he'd have known how to optimize things so he didn't need to work his ass off. I've been loafing about the last few decades and my liquid net worth is just over $4m having barely lifted a finger.

62450615
>>62450584

This is where we mention there is autistic "intelligent", and then there is intuition. Some people can solve anything you put in front of them but can't inductively synthesize a shrewd or creative idea. AI brain, basically lol.

62450621
>>62449887
High IQ overthink, underact, avoid risk taking
>AAAHH! I have tooo thiiiiiink first
Low IQ underthing, overact and dont even register risk

62450636
>>62450584
Wanna invest in my super secret club?

62450659
Naybe OP isn't.smart enough to recognize whether somebody os a genius. What if the brother in law is actually a dumb ass and has people fooled?

62451127
>>62449873
These bots think they are posting their demoralization threads on reddit now

62452004
>>62449873
making it is more about emotional regulation than about iq past like 110 or so

62454704
>>62449873
BORING

62454725
>>62449873
Business is literally only about
>distribution
and
>managing skills of others
Doesn't even matter if yo ruin someone's wedding or house or roof or anything by hiring an imbecile
You got hired
and if you can get hired at volume
that's the hardest fucking part
getting users on your platform, getting people to give you their money
there are plenty of Mexicans and shit willing to work
the hard part is getting the work
You can have the best idea in the world, be a better carpenter than Jesus' dad,
but if you're invisible, the dude who has signs all over town with an IQ of 88 and does a shit job will get filthy fucking rich.

item.title: ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers — 14 replies — 16.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:35 UTC

OP

I literally did everything society told me to do. I survived four grueling years at State U. I made a LinkedIn. I have a bachelor's. I even bought one interview shirt. And THIS is how I'm repaid? AI took half the jobs, offshoring took the rest, every HR roastie recruiter ghosts me because they can somehow tell I'm not one of their corporate NPCs, and boomers bought five-bedroom houses with a summer job. Don't tell me to relocate. Don't tell me to commute. Don't tell me to get roommates. Don't tell me to buy a starter home. Don't tell me to lower my expectations. I was promised a six-figure remote job, unlimited PTO, and my dream house by 24. If I don't have all of that, then clearly the system is broken...not me. I am the victim here.

Early replies (first 3)

62451138
My female peers are all sucking and fucking big millennial cock

62451340
I'm single and I need a 3 bed 2 bath house so I can play video games and masturbate in peace.

62451425
Hurr durr boomers all got free houses, free virgins and free ubereats avocado toast thats why im a fat smelly incel

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451434
>>62451128
I don't get the obsession with zoomers.

62451447
>>62451128
I kinda miss when zoomers looked like this. It was very cute and endearing. Now zoomers look like haggard wraiths with how badly they're aging from all the stress, nicotine, and forever chemicals. Very sad generation, and I don't mean sad as in pathetic. Like genuinely sad. At least Millennials had a decent glimpse of the old world.

62451451
Hmm better get my hair curled into a big broccoli head

62451485
Things are so bad that I am rooting for this guy to kill some assholes and I am in my 40s. Lead head gens please get out of the way so we can fix things.

62451567
>>62451128
>>62451138
>>62451425
Holy seethe

62451617
>>62451128
which part of this is wrong though?

62451620
pic related is a 16 years old zoomer

u jelly?

62451690
>>62451620
Meddl.

62451726
>>62451128
I feel bad for later zoomers because they were sold on this lie that IT/tech was the next huge thing during the 2016-2022 boom (when a lot of zoomers were in college). Now the tech market is basically completely dead and shrinking even more ever day with big companies laying off workers and replacing them with AI or Indians (h1b or offshore).

62454736
>>62451128
boring ass thread lol

62454829
>>62451128
If you weren't part of the top 1% in 2026 before 30, you're part of the permanent underclass and your life is over

item.title: Months from now… years from now… people will wish they had recognized what was sitting right in front of them for years. — 7 replies — 12.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Months from now… years from now… people will wish they had recognized what was sitting right in front of them for years.

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:51 UTC

OP

Months from now… years from now… people will wish they had recognized what was sitting right in front of them for years.

Most people think they’ll sell XRP and simply buy back lower.

They still don’t understand what happens when real utility creates real demand, real economic activity, and real liquidity. That’s a completely different market.

As more organizations connect to the network, demand doesn’t just appear… it compounds. That’s how multi-trillion dollar markets are built.

Humanity has never witnessed a utility driven financial transformation on this scale. For the first time, we get to live through it together.

Excited for the next chapter.

Early replies (first 3)

62450170
It's had more than a decade for all that, ain't happening champ

62450645
>>62450165
Xrp was $3.20 in 2018 lol, shut up faggot

62450808
>>62450170
>>62450645
Obtuse gay jewish fingers typed these.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451330
So bullish

62453970
>>62450808

62453976
>>62450165
>Months from now
How can you not see the wisdom of owning a coin that is down over 50% in 6 months.. everyone that is selling is a fool... BUY more... PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE buy more... I have to sell before the rent is due!!!

62454861
So fucking bullish XRP

item.title: Extra Cash Besides a JOB — 25 replies — 11.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Extra Cash Besides a JOB

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-07-07 11:17 UTC

OP

Getting the obvious out of the way, everyone on this board is employed or in massive leveraged debt
That aside, what are you tried and true, consistent, easily accessible ways to make money on the side. Whether it's 50 bucks a week or 500 I don't care, just share some examples and provide actual explanations / results of the side gig whenever possible.
We are all on the same money making team bros let's help each other out

Early replies (first 3)

62446864
>>62446849
I fuck around on oil futures. Make like $25/day on average. It's time consuming but I do it during downtime at the office so why not.

62446865
Start a business and work at it 3 years you will be millionaire

62446869
>>62446865
what part of side or extra do you not understand dumb retarded faggot

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62446903
>>62446869
he's right though
most side-gigs are just bad businesses

if you get a successful side-gig you're running a good business.

anyways my side gig was crime scene cleanup, hazardous waste cleanup, and office cleaning. I made millions doing it and now it's my main business.

62446919
>>62446869
You are missing the part where stop crying on incel threads and start a business

62446925
Donate plasma, bonus it filters out microplastics; downside it takes two fucking hours.

62446939
i started a massage business and i only take clients if they sound hot...so far ive been able to make a good call 51% of the time every time.

62446991
>>62446903
See now im imagining dave ramsey telling people to buy a power washer and clean up crime scenes
anyway why is a multimillionaire on 4chan cmon

62446993
>>62446991
To show you losers the way. What you think millionaires don't shit!

62446997
>>62446991
in my generation millionaire isn't anything special. The median net of people my age is almost half a million, meaning at least a third of us are millionaires. Mostly because we bought houses way back in the late 1900's

anyways crime scene cleanup is pretty specialized. It's not regular work for most people because there just aren't that many murders and suicides. But it pays hundreds of dollars per hour so it's worth doing if you can.

62447037
Do you have any of those stores that buy and sell returned Amazon goods near you? Go on a restock day with a barcode scanner app handy and pick up any fancy electronics. It's pretty easy to find 50$+ things like headphones, watches, and more niche devices to resell on marketplace, eBay, etc.

62447512
>>62446849
unironically buy pokemon sealed products and sell in 1-2 years for 3-5x

62447559
>>62447512
Pist a picture of the ones you bought for this opportunity

62447924
anyone know of good AI strats

62449474
Bump

62449570
>>62446991

62449661
>>62447924
Lots. Finding the energy to do it after doing similar shit all day at a full time job is a different story.

Thinking about just running a POD node on my 5090 to rent out inference, but no idea what the returns on it would be, just know that POD's been climbing.

62450354
>>62449661
Yeah that’s what I’ve experienced I’ve made some money but it takes too much active work

62450987
Bumping

62451012
>>62446849
Making/selling crack, pimping, prostituting yourself, re-selling underpriced stuff you find at garage sales.

62451059
>>62451012
I think there is definitely a scale to the legality of your suggestions

62451064
>It's another episode of "I want money but don't want to work for it; please give me a cheat code"

62451605
>>62446849
rent out a spare bedroom in your house.
make sure it goes to a white person and do a little screening before hand and you should be safe.

62451739
>>62446849
I'm on disability and I watch my kids so no childcare expenses.making 1200 a month probably saving that much too

62454672
>>62446849
sell drugs

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-07-07 12:24 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62453050
>>62453039
>i never liked short guys

62453069
Burry is going short on AI and semiconductors, which are currently down. Burry is winning, cheeto insider trading jewlover is a loser.

62453074
>>62453039
What is wrong with that guy? Like seriously, he's been like this for over a decade now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62453087
>AI is an addiction
>I'm going to short it

When has shorting a societal addiction ever worked out? Fast food been going for 70 years. Smoking lasted 100s. Fucking retarded. AI is only a couple years in.

62453112
>>62453087
>Fast food been going for 70 year
and collectively has a market capitalization that is a mere fraction of an anime porn generator

62453591
>>62453112
Só? Bears lost.
>AI won

62454151
lul got em

62454314
>>62453039
This is unironically bearish as fuck and I hold stocks

62454769
>>62453074
he got one big win and he's been chasing that high since.
he needs a win to sell another book and make another movie

62454805
>>62454769
This is the dumbest take that gets repeated on /biz/. Burry was extremely successful before he decided to short MBS's.

item.title: >sells STRC to buy Bitcoin >sells Bitcoin to pay for STRC dividends What did he mean by that? — 2 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>sells STRC to buy Bitcoin >sells Bitcoin to pay for STRC dividends What did he mean by that?

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-07-07 13:24 UTC

OP

>sells STRC to buy Bitcoin
>sells Bitcoin to pay for STRC dividends
What did he mean by that?

Early replies (first 3)

62454958
>buy high
>sell low

62454964
>>62454956
Had to fund the ponzi somehow.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.
